title: beskid lsp subcommand for editor stdio server

source.subject: feat(cli): add `beskid lsp` subcommand for editor stdio server

body:
Editors launch the language server through `beskid lsp` over stdio, replacing ad-hoc binary paths and aligning with the rolling `cli-latest` release model.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`a86a6d6`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/a86a6d6)
- **Subject:** feat(cli): add `beskid lsp` subcommand for editor stdio server
- **Completed:** 2026-05-25

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `editor-extension`
- **Domain:** `tooling`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-editor-lsp-cli`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **CLI LSP launch & VS Code toolchain** (`v03-editor-lsp-cli`).
